description: Welcome to Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022 at Pateo. The event features a packed schedule with technical deep dives, workshops, and discussions. Attendees are encouraged to utilize noise-canceling headsets for better audio experience. Refreshments are available, and shuttles are running to other venues. The day concludes with a closing ceremony and celebration featuring DJs.
topic_summary: Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022 includes technical sessions, networking opportunities, and a closing ceremony with entertainment. Keynote by Chris from Dialect on smart messaging and notifications, highlighting integration in Solana wallets [t=151.04].
